query: SELECT a.id, a.extensivOrderId, a.facilityId as fid_2, b.facilityId as fid_3, b.facilityName as name_3 FROM order_tracking a JOIN order_tracking b ON a.extensivOrderId = b.extensivOrderId AND a.configId = b.configId WHERE a.facilityId = 2 AND a.facilityName = 'RENO - Reno' AND b.facilityId = 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4NCq8mAsshAuKGA.2865343ca485 --database K5ogkLhSXtccCnqH4Vm3fs --execute SELECT a.id, a.extensivOrderId, a.facilityId as fid_2, b.facilityId as fid_3, b.facilityName as name_3 FROM order_tracking a JOIN order_tracking b ON a.extensivOrderId = b.extensivOrderId AND a.configId = b.configId WHERE a.facilityId = 2 AND a.facilityName = 'RENO - Reno' AND b.facilityId = 3;
